item.title: Watch as they try and push the progressive movement off the cliff
item.description:
If you don’t know, Jamie Harrison was the Party chair from 2021 to 2025… ya know the time when the party went from controlling both chambers of congress and the White House to now controlling none of them…
“A stronger Democratic Party is part of the job”… but only if you don’t threaten to tax the rich or make working class people’s lives better
The post of Bernie’s he’s responding to if you don’t remember it:
Ultimately, Jamie Harrison is now irrelevant. He’s time was defined by one of the biggest political failures ever. This post isn’t really about him so much as it is to show you that the establishment of the Democratic Party is NOT your ally, and would much rather the progressive fail than succeed, because they serve and always have served the rich. You wanna know why the democrats lose so often? Because they serve capitalism and imperialism first, and only want to give you just enough that you’ll shut up.
Time for a change
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44

Sir, you exploded.
Hehehehe

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1728 (morality of message edits)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Machu Picchu was built as a royal retreat for the Incan Emperor Pachucuti
Ancient Americas on YouTube just put out a great video on the rise of the Olmec civilization
Dippers
(The glyph is for a particular type of war amongst the Classic Maya that is associated with Venus that Archaeologists, being *fucking goddamn nerds*, call a "Star War".) These wars were particularly destructive and often ended up as wars of conquest, and the dynasty that was in charge of a particular city usually would end up massacred.
Saw my first indigo bunting of the year yesterday while on the one tour we are still running right now. All the others have shut down because of the wildfire or smoke from aforementioned wildfire.
Obscure jokes about Islamic schools of jurisprudence
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Glory Pippin. What doing? Peek a boo!" _____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

26 Man Tax: Adam Huber
"Education is what survives when what has been learned has been forgotten." - B.F. Skinner So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: unclefishbits

item.title: Traditional German Dishes: Jägerpfanne
item.description:
Hello fellow Imgurians! Today I want to show you how to make a real German Jägerpfanne. This is a very heartly and awesome dish. I hope you like it! For what I made you need: 2 whole pork filets 200g bacon bits 500gr of mushrooms (champignons) 2 onions 1 clove of garlic 200ml cream 200ml sour creme 2 tbls of tomato paste some parsley some mustard salt and pepper butter
1) First start by seasoning the meat from all sites.
2) heat some butter on high heat (dont let it smoke tho) and fry the meat for around 5 minutes total. You want it crisp from the outside but not completely done from the inside.
3) Remove the filets and put them aside.
4) In the same pan fry your bacon and onion bits and the garlic. Make sure to stir so the garlic does not burn away.
5) This is what you want it to look like.
6) Meanwhile chop the shrooms in slices. I have white and brown ones beacause why not, you can just take which kind you get.
7) When done add them to the pan.
8) Mix them though the onions, garlic bacon mixture and let them cook on medium heat.
9) Make sure to always have someone watching the pan, so the shrooms don't burn.
9) When it looks like this mix one tablespoon of tomate paste and turn up the heat and fry the paste. This step takes like 3 minutes.
10) Add the cream and the sour cream, let it cook on small to medium heat.
11) Slice the filets. If they look like this you did it perfectly. They will cook a little bit more in the sauce later, so dont be scared of the color.
12) This is awesome!
13) Make sure to slice them in these bits, they are typically Jägerpfanne-shaped.
Final) Add the meat to the sauce. Add a little bit of mustard if you want. This is optinal, but gives it a nice depht. Also sprinkle some parsley because why not. Let it cook on small to medium heat until the color is like mine on this picture and the meat is as done as you want it.
At voilà. We had with Gnocchi and some red cabagge but really everything potatoish works.
I hope you enjoyed it! :) Make sure to check out my old posts if you want to see more Traditional German Dishes: https://imgur.com/user/SaschaDB/posts
item.dc:creator: SaschaDB

item.title: Update...
item.description: At Dr's now. Just waiting to be seen. So nervous. Fingers crossed for weird fatty lump, cist, or Xenomorph. Not cancer. Edit... WELL FUCK
